ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Pee.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Poop.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to pee.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to poop.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in their bladder is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in their bowels is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor}  If they don't find a toilet soon, they will wet themselves!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Poop.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor}  If they don't find a toilet soon, they will soil themselves!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Pee.message: {target} truly doesn't need to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Poop.message: {target} truly doesn't need to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} thinks they don't need to pee, but actually {fgcolor:yellow}are starting to need to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Warning.Poop.message: {target} thinks they don't need to poop, but actually {fgcolor:yellow}are starting to need to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Danger.Pee.message: {target} thinks they don't need to pee, but actually {fgcolor:orange}urgently needs to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} thinks they don't need to poop, but actually {fgcolor:orange}urgently needs to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} thinks they don't need to pee, but actually {fgcolor:red}are on the verge of wetting themselves{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Bursting.Poop.message: {target} thinks they don't need to poop, but actually {fgcolor:red}are on the verge of soiling themselves{/fgcolor}.
